name: n8n-latest
short_desc: Workflow automation tool that connects apps and services together.
author: n8n-io
description: n8n is a free and source-available workflow automation tool. It allows you to connect anything to everything via its node-based approach, making it highly versatile. You can build complex automations with a visual editor, integrate with hundreds of services, and self-host it for full control over your data and workflows.

form_fields.label: Webhook URL
form_fields.hint: The public URL of your n8n instance for webhooks (e.g. https://n8n.example.com).
